failures.description: The run failed because the catalog search dependency timed out when the agent made the correct search call, leaving the agent without tool evidence to answer the question.
failures.checklist_reasoning: At index 2, the Researcher briefly introduced an inconsistent value in its natural-language output (saying it would call ProductCatalogSearch with "bagless" even though the plan and structured tool args said "bagged"). That inconsistency was resolved immediately because the actual tool invocation at index 3 used the correct arguments with "bagged". The first unresolved failure occurs at index 3: the agent attempted a valid ProductCatalogSearch call, and the tool/runtime explicitly returned an infrastructure/connectivity-style timeout error: "catalog search dependency timed out after 30000ms" / "CatalogServiceTimeoutError". This is not a schema/argument error, not a guardrail/access block, and not an intent misunderstanding.
